name: Matt Dennis
description: American singer, pianist, band leader, arranger, and writer of music (1914–2002)
abstract: Matthew Loveland Dennis (February 11, 1914 – June 21, 2002) was an American singer, pianist, band leader, arranger, and writer of music for popular songs.

works_created.t: The Night We Called It a Day
